cards.front: When maintaining biodiversity, what action is specifically associated with agricultural areas where farmers grow only one type of crop?
cards.explanation: The specification pairs reintroduction of field margins and hedgerows with agricultural areas where farmers grow only one type of crop.

choices.feedback: Correct. This is the action linked to agricultural areas where farmers grow only one type of crop.
This is listed for endangered species, not as the action linked to single-crop agricultural areas.
This is the broader action listed for rare habitats, not the specified action for single-crop agricultural areas.

choices.text: Reduce deforestation and carbon dioxide emissions.
choices.feedback: This is a separate listed action, not the one linked to single-crop agricultural areas.

cards.sourceExcerpt:
These include:
• breeding programmes for endangered species
• protection and regeneration of rare habitats
• reintroduction of field margins and hedgerows in agricultural
areas where farmers grow only one type of crop
• reduction of deforestation and carbon dioxide emissions by
some governments
• recycling resources rather than dumping waste in landfill.
